sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3605" key="a)kro/paqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρό-παθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n3605.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀκρόπλοος</ref></xr>, q.v.</sense> </entryFree>
